title: Chapter 22 Summary
main_description: The crew lands on the Island of Rare Animals and meets Gaimon, a former pirate trapped in a treasure chest. The chapter acts as a quiet fable about treasure, loneliness, and choosing the life one has built.
key_events: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami reach a strange island.
Gaimon warns them about the forest and its rare animals.
Gaimon’s treasure story becomes a small lesson about dreams and acceptance.
